Web search results for query: "CSS "grid-lanes" masonry specification 2025 "display: grid-lanes" CSSWG resolution"

Links: [{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – Masonry Spec Update and Open Issues","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/09/18/masonry-update-issues/"},{"title":"CSS Grid Layout Module Level 3","url":"https://www.w3.org/TR/css-grid-3/"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes Kills Masonry.js: WebKit Ships Native CSS | byteiota","url":"https://byteiota.com/css-grid-lanes-kills-masonry-js-webkit-ships-native-css/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes (Masonry Layout) Is Here: A Complete Guide for 2026 - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/bean_bean/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout-is-here-a-complete-guide-for-2026-4686"},{"title":"Introducing CSS Grid Lanes | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/17660/introducing-css-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://247webdevs.blogspot.com/2025/12/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes.html"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CSS grid-lanes masonry specification and the CSSWG resolution:

## CSSWG Resolution (January 31, 2025)

On January 31st of 2025, the CSS Working Group held a meeting and resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout. This resolution involved the CSS WG voting to reuse grid-* properties, adopting the display: grid-lanes syntax.

## Specification Details

Level 3 of the CSS grid layout specification defines masonry layout (also known as grid-lanes layout), which is accessed via the display values grid-lanes and inline-grid-lanes. To create the most common masonry layout where the columns are laid out in a grid, and the rows stack like masonry, use display: grid-lanes along with grid-template-columns.

## Publication and Implementation

The specification published March 28, 2025 as CSS Grid Layout Level 3. Safari leads with Technology Preview 234 (shipped December 19), and Chrome follows with experimental support in Chrome 140.

## Background of the Debate

The CSS Working Group debated for five years (2020-2025) about whether to integrate masonry into CSS Grid or create a separate module. Chrome initially prototyped display: masonry, Firefox tried grid-template-columns: masonry, and WebKit advocated for grid integration.
